positive: A mystical, celestial forest scene printed with a bold, symmetrical gothic-floral pattern. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate vines, integrated with architectural elements resembling glowing stained-glass windows and twisting root systems. The color palette is deep midnight blue, shimmering sapphire, emerald green, and accented with brilliant gold foil highlights. Use stark contrast, clean vector lines, and strong silhouettes against a slightly textured, cosmic background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and intricate Zazzle-style ethnic textile design, optimized for printing on dark fabric. Highly detailed, highly ornate, symmetrical composition, central focus, tattoo art style, high contrast,
